title: sorbus aucuparia var. lanata
intro: Sorbus aucuparia var. lanata, also known as the white mountain ash or woolly mountain ash, is a variety of the mountain ash tree that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues such as fever, coughs, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Sorbus aucuparia var. lanata include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory health. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
